name: HTML & CSS Fundamentals
description: Learn HTML5 and CSS3 from scratch. Build responsive websites using Flexbox and Grid.

name: JavaScript Essentials
description: Master JavaScript fundamentals including variables, functions, DOM, events, and ES6.

name: React Development
description: Build modern React applications using components, hooks, routing, and API integration.

name: Node.js & Express
description: Create REST APIs using Node.js, Express, middleware, routing, and MongoDB.

name: Python Programming
description: Learn Python from basics to advanced concepts including OOP and file handling.

name: UI/UX Design
description: Understand design principles, wireframing, prototyping, and Figma.

name: Java Programming
description: Learn Java programming, object-oriented concepts, collections, and multithreading.

name: Data Structures & Algorithms
description: Master arrays, linked lists, trees, graphs, dynamic programming, and interview problems.

name: Advanced CSS & Animations
description: Master Flexbox, Grid, CSS animations, transitions, and responsive layouts.

name: Bootstrap 5 Complete Guide
description: Build responsive websites quickly using Bootstrap components and utilities.

name: MongoDB Database
description: Learn MongoDB collections, CRUD operations, aggregation, and indexing.

name: Spring Boot Fundamentals
description: Develop REST APIs and enterprise applications using Spring Boot.

name: Machine Learning Basics
description: Understand machine learning algorithms, regression, classification, and model evaluation.

name: Python for Data Science
description: Use NumPy, Pandas, and Matplotlib for data analysis and visualization.

name: UI/UX Design with Figma
description: Design beautiful user interfaces and interactive prototypes using Figma.

name: AWS Cloud Essentials
description: Learn EC2, S3, IAM, VPC, Lambda, and cloud deployment fundamentals.

name: Cyber Security Fundamentals
description: Explore ethical hacking, network security, encryption, and cyber threats.

name: Artificial Intelligence
description: Learn AI concepts, neural networks, computer vision, and natural language processing.

name: Flutter App Development
description: Build cross-platform Android and iOS applications using Flutter and Dart.

name: Git & GitHub Masterclass
description: Master Git commands, branching, merging, pull requests, and GitHub collaboration.
